case_title: JAMES SALES VS. METRO PCS LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALES, JAMES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JAMES SALES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BENARD ELLIS, REGINAL OPS MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALES, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC PLAINTIFF PROVIDED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT HIS PHONES WERE INSURED, THAT METRO PCS FAILED TO HONOR AN INSURANCE CONTRACT, OR THAT HE PURCHASED HIS MOST RECENT PHONE FROM A METRO PCS OWNED STORE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-30-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SALES, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALES, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT METRO PCS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
